autoRouteSub: Default model · optional scene routing via intent header
autoNodeSub: Uses default model; scenes routed via intent header

chatEmptyHint: Send a message to start. Context is kept within this chat.
ctxStripEmpty: No memories yet — add some in Memory

agentWriteSub: The agent will create or overwrite this file in your workspace.
agentDeleteSub: The agent will permanently delete this file in your workspace.
demoUser: Add install instructions to README.md and check duplicate dependencies.
demoAssist1: Reading local files, then updating the doc.
demoAssist2: Done. No duplicate deps in Cargo.toml.
connectBannerTitle: Want Cursor? Connect anytime in Connect apps
connectBannerSub: Chat works without it. Live usage is in Overview or the menu bar tray
memorySub: Prefs, projects & facts — shared with chat & apps (toggle in settings)
memoryNote: Chat-first users use memory too; Cursor can read the same store as you grow.
sourcesSub: Allowance via NodeAI cloud; your keys run locally — never through our servers
sourcesNote: Format translation runs automatically: cloud for allowance, on-device for your keys.
byokPrivacyBody: API keys stay in Keychain only. Inference, compress & format run on device — not via NodeAI cloud.
sourceKeyHint: Key stored in Keychain only — never uploaded to NodeAI
modeLocalSub: Inference goes direct to your provider. Sign in to enable allowance path.

acctLocalSub: Your keys only · sign in from sidebar for allowance
fbTier1Sub: Device → NodeAI server → upstream · auto model pick
fbTier2Sub: Direct to your provider on device · no NodeAI server
fbTier3Sub: Switch upstream when unavailable · keep allowance path alive
setHybridFb: Use allowance if my key fails
setHybridFbSub: Off by default · may send requests to cloud if key fails
setHybridFbConfirm: When your own API key fails, NodeAI may retry via your allowance path on the cloud. Enable this?
billPathNoteAll: Allowance and your keys tracked separately
setSignInHostedSub: Keep using your keys locally; sign in for allowance path & unified billing
apiCapsSub: Same address — allowance via NodeAI cloud; your keys on device
setFailoverSub: Switch models when limited or down — fewer outages
setBudgetAlertSub: Tray notification when allowance is low or an app spikes
setAgentSub: Let chat Agent read and edit local project files
setSmartRouteSub: Scene-based routing; can include your sources
setByokRoute: Include my sources in auto pick
setByokRouteSub: Pick only sources you added on device — no NodeAI server
setTranslatorSub: OpenAI ↔ Anthropic ↔ Gemini · invisible to you
setCursorWriteSub: Off by default to avoid agent pollution
setConciseLevelSub: Level 1 default · higher saves more tokens
setCrossMemSub: Cursor etc. can read saved prefs & project context
billFailoverIdle: Auto failover ready · no requests yet
Auto failover ready · no requests yet

gwHeroSub: Copy address + access code → Cursor Settings → Models
celebrateSub: NodeAI detected your first call. Open Overview or the tray for live usage & savings.

composerPh: Ask anything — attach files or images…
composerHint: Files & images · live usage in tray or Overview
wsPopHint: Agent reads/writes files in this folder by default · writes/deletes ask first · never touches system dirs or keys.
setWorkspaceSub: Default folder for Agent file read/write · writes/deletes ask first
billingSub: Chat + other apps on one bill
appsSub: See who's using and what it costs
setCompressSub: Less usage on code, logs & diffs
setReplyLangSub: Default note for new chats; editable per thread
setGatewayPortSub: Default 8787. After changing, update Base URL in Cursor & other apps
setLocalServerSub: On by default while the app runs (Always-on). Pause only when you need to; external apps like Cursor cannot call while paused — built-in chat is unaffected.
toastPortSaved: Port updated · sync address in external apps
setPruneSub: Summarize old messages in long chats

tipConcise: Saved by shorter, less verbose replies

planSub: Subscription includes AI allowance + savings engine; overage metered on one bill
planAllowFoot: After allowance: ¥0.018/1K tokens; Free tier ¥12/mo only

gwStep0Title: Pick your route in NodeAI first
gwStep0Sub: Confirm before connecting — all apps use this route
gwCursorHintBody: Set Cursor Model to nodeai-auto to let NodeAI auto-pick; or enter a specific model to pin it, or leave blank to follow the route.
vpnAppsFoot: {apps} — {n} apps on this route (incl. Cursor & chat)
vpnAppsFootNone: Connected apps will use this route
smartRouteSub: Pick the cheapest model that fits the scene
smartExplainBody: Pick a scene only — NodeAI routes each task to the cheapest model that fits. No need to track model names.
gwRouteApps: All connected apps use this route — no per-app model setup.
gwRouteHint: Paste address + access code; set Model to nodeai-auto. A specific model pins it; blank or unknown values follow the route.
gwModelNoteText: Set Model to nodeai-auto in Cursor/Cline — switch routes in NodeAI Models; 8787 forwards automatically.
sceneModelsHintSmart: Smart mode picks the recommended model per scene; tap a row to pin one model
sceneModelsHintFixed: Pinned route — all apps use the selected model
modelsFoot: Allowance path routes via NodeAI cloud to Vercel AI Gateway; your keys stay on-device.
planBizNote: Free tier is for trying connect + billing. Pro for daily use. Team bills per seat — no unlimited free ride.
planBizP1: You pay NodeAI one bill (subscription + overage). We route to upstream AI with compress & smart routing by default.
planBiz1: Subscription = allowance + console + live app ID & full billing
planBiz2: Overage ≈ upstream cost + small service fee
planBiz3: Savings verifiable: compress / routing line items on bill
authHeroTitle: Desktop AI usage hub — chat, connect, save
authHeroSub: Start chatting; connect Cursor and add your model sources as you grow.
authHeroSubLong: Chat instantly; connect Cursor and your API keys later. Nine API types, compression, routing, memory — one bill.
authVal1d: Allowance-backed models · no Codex / Claude Code required first
authVal2d: Nine API types · auto format conversion · one local address for all apps
authVal3d: Compress + smart routing + auto reroute · savings on your bill
authVal4d: Memory · your keys · Cursor / OpenClaw when you're ready
authRoiSub: vs calling models directly · includes compression & routing
authOAuthSoon: OAuth coming soon — use email for now
authByokOnlyFull: Use my API keys only · no sign-in
authByokHint: Inference stays on device · keys never leave this Mac

authOr: or
